subcodes.first_line: The essence of praise and the reality of glorification befitteth the hallowed court of the Lord of Spring [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جوهر حمد و حقیقت ثنا بساط مقدس حضرت بهارا
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice and wrath of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
